overview: SSPS provides a home away from home with its modern hostel facilities, ensuring a safe and comfortable environment for students from across the region.

facilities.name: Dormitories
facilities.description: Spacious, well-ventilated rooms with individual storage and study desks.

facilities.name: Dining
facilities.description: Nutritious and balanced vegetarian meals prepared in a hygienic kitchen.

facilities.name: Medical
facilities.description: 24/7 medical assistance and regular health check-ups.

facilities.name: Security
facilities.description: CCTV surveillance and round-the-clock security personnel.

facilities.name: Recreation
facilities.description: Common room with TV, indoor games, and scheduled recreational activities.

facilities.name: Academic Support
facilities.description: Supervised study hours and extra coaching for residential students.
